scripts.kill: pnpm kill:web; pnpm kill:server; pnpm kill:desktop; echo '✅ 已清理所有开发端口'
scripts.kill:web: lsof -i -P | grep LISTEN | grep -E ':(517[0-9])' | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ 已清理前端端口'
scripts.kill:server: lsof -i -P | grep LISTEN | grep -E ':(8000)' | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ 已清理后端端口'
scripts.kill:desktop: lsof -i -P | grep LISTEN | grep -E ':(1800[0-9])' | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ 已清理桌面端端口'
